name: r1_state_v0_1
purpose: Minimal resolved state produced by the kernel map r0 -> r1.

localized_site.description: Discrete site at which the spark resolves.

centroid_orientation.description: Finite orientation label of the centroid relative to the resolved spark.

initial_grammar_state.description: Seed grammar state for downstream deterministic propagation.

canonical_sentence: r1 is the resolved state consisting of a localized site, a centroid orientation, and an initial grammar seed.
